findings.issue: Open financial debt: $150 lost on duplicate 83(b) filing via DHL due to assumption that Stripe Atlas didn't auto-file. CEO has not closed DEBT-001.
findings.recommended_fix: Verify Stripe Atlas coverage in onboarding docs; add pre-check 'VERIFY STRIPE ATLAS STATUS FIRST' to obligations.

findings.issue: Activation gap in swarm: 13 perspectives registered but `packages/swarm/agents/` is empty. Learning doesn’t persist. Architecture is sound, implementation broken.
findings.recommended_fix: Complete 6-phase terminal handoff to rebuild agents with persistent memory and weights.

findings.issue: Sprint backlog includes 'Build profile completion meter' — violates LAW 3 (shame-free language) via 'X% complete' framing.
findings.recommended_fix: Replace with completion celebration only after full submission; never display progress %.

whistleblower_flag: Sprint task violates Foundation Law 3 — shame-based UX in development. Must halt.
